name: Frosty
description: Frosty is a playful and curious young rabbit who loves exploring.

name: Lola
description: Lola is calm and gentle, loves to be petted and enjoys long naps.

name: Cookie
description: Cookie is friendly and loves interacting with people, very social.

name: Teeny
description: Teeny is a small but energetic rabbit, loves running around and playing with toys.

name: Cinnamon
description: Cinnamon is sweet-natured and enjoys spending time with other rabbits.
